Release notes for PebbleOS v1.7.x updates, detailing new features and bug fixes.

# Purpose
The document contains release notes for various versions of the PebbleOS firmware, specifically versions 1.7.1a, 1.7.0b, 1.7.1, and 1.7.2. These notes provide detailed information about new features, enhancements, and bug fixes included in each release. The release notes serve as a communication tool to inform users and developers about improvements such as enhanced power management, animated user interfaces, and improved notification support for Android and iOS devices. Additionally, the notes document specific bug fixes that address system stability, notification issues, and user interface glitches. This information is crucial for users to understand the changes and improvements in each firmware update and for developers to track the evolution of the software.
# Content Summary
The provided content consists of release notes for various versions of the PebbleOS firmware for the Pebble smartwatch. These notes detail new features, enhancements, and bug fixes across different versions.

**Pebble Firmware v1.7.1a (Grand Slam):** This release introduces several new features and improvements. Key updates include enhanced power management, which extends battery life to approximately 2 days with iOS and 4 days with Android. An animated user interface is introduced, although it is still under development. The user interface has been improved based on user feedback, and a new battery gauge is added to the status bar. Android support is expanded with incoming call notifications and music control for specific stock music players. A new watchface, "Fuzzy Time," is introduced, displaying time to the nearest 5 minutes. Bug fixes address issues such as Bluetooth address visibility in airplane mode, notification app character errors, internal clock accuracy, UI glitches in Bluetooth settings, and missing notification content.

**PebbleOS v1.7.0b:** This update focuses on fixing critical bugs from the previous version, v1.7.0a. It resolves system stability issues causing reboots, incorrect alarm times, time-saving across reboots, stale data in iOS MAP notifications, and a text-rendering bug in the Sliding Text watchface.

**PebbleOS v1.7.1:** This update addresses critical bugs from the v1.7.1 update. Fixes include issues in the Getting Started/Firmware Update processes, incorrect notification UI icons, animation issues with the status bar, bugs in the iOS HFP call notification UI, and changes to the tap-to-backlight functionality.

**PebbleOS v1.7.2:** This update resolves a specific bug related to manufacturing line testability from the v1.7.1 update.

These release notes provide essential information for developers and users about the enhancements and bug fixes in each version, ensuring they are aware of the changes and improvements made to the PebbleOS firmware.
